basic_details.job_title: MPEZ Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 72 Graduate & Technical Apprentice Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Madhya Pradesh Poorv Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company Limited (MPEZ), Jabalpur
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice & Technical (Diploma) Apprentice (under Apprentices Act, 1961)
basic_details.short_information: MPEZ Jabalpur is recruiting 72 Graduate and Technical Apprentice posts with B.E/B.Tech, B.Com., and Diploma qualification, last date 25 June 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notification. Candidates are advised to check the official website www.mpez.co.in for any updates regarding fee.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01-01-2026. Minimum age for all categories is 18 years. Upper age relaxation of 5 years is available for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) and PwBD (Divyang) candidates.

qualification.domicile: Madhya Pradesh domicile (Mool Niwasi) only. Domicile certificate (Mool Niwasi Praman Patra) is mandatory.
qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical / Civil / IT / CSE), B.Com., or Diploma (Electrical / Civil Engineering) from a Government-recognized institution, passed between 2022 and 2026.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions. Only Madhya Pradesh domicile (Mool Niwasi) candidates are eligible to apply. Candidates must mandatorily register on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) and have a valid Apprentice Registration Number before applying.

salary_details.pay_scale: Graduate Apprentice: Rs. 12,300/- per month; Technical (Diploma) Apprentice: Rs. 10,900/- per month (no other allowances/benefits)
salary_details.details: Stipend is payable as per the guidelines issued by the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India. No other allowances or benefits are admissible beyond the stipend.

selection_process: Selection will be purely merit-based on aggregate percentage of marks obtained in the qualifying degree/diploma examination. No written test is conducted. A waiting list will be maintained and may be used to fill vacancies as they arise. The waiting list will remain valid for one year from the date of announcement of the first result.

Applications received up to the last date will be screened for eligibility as per the advertisement. Candidates will then be ranked in order of merit (descending order of aggregate percentage in B.E/B.Tech/B.Com/Diploma). In case of a tie in marks
the candidate who is older in age will be given priority. If required
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in offline mode. Applications submitted before 25-05-2026 or after 25-06-2026 (5:30 PM) will not be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily register and complete 100% profile on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) and obtain a valid Apprentice Registration Number. Detailed instructions for Registration, Profile Completion, and Apply for Establishment are available at https://nats.education.gov.in/assets/manual/student_manual.pdf.

For any difficulty in NATS portal registration, contact: Email: [email protected] | Phone: +91-22-24055635 / 24053682 | Toll Free: 1800-222-060 | Director of Training and Regional Central Apprenticeship Advisor, Board of Apprenticeship Training (Western Region), 2nd Floor, Administrative Building, ATI Campus, V.N. Purav Marg, Sion, Mumbai - 400022.
Documents Required to be Submitted Along with Application (Self-Attested Photocopies):
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT REGULAR EMPLOYMENT. This advertisement is for apprenticeship training under Apprentices Act 1961, Section 22(1). MPEZ is not obligated to offer any employment after completion of training. Regular/contractual recruitment at MPEZ will not carry any reservation benefit related to this apprenticeship. Vacancies are only for Madhya Pradesh domicile (Mool Niwasi) candidates. Applications from non-MP domicile candidates will be rejected. Candidates must apply for only ONE trade/branch. Applications with more than one trade selected will be cancelled. NATS portal registration with 100% completed profile and a valid Apprentice Registration Number is mandatory before applying. The date of passing the qualifying examination must not be more than 5 years from the NATS registration approval date; if NATS registration is not approved, the selection will be cancelled. Candidates who have previously completed apprenticeship training in the same trade at MPEZ or any other organization cannot apply again for the same trade. If any candidate is found to have concealed or provided incorrect information at any stage, their candidature will be cancelled and legal action may be taken. SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) and PwBD candidates must carefully fill in their category; no category change will be permitted after submission. During the training period, selected candidates will be entitled to 13 days casual leave, 15 days medical leave, and weekly and national holidays. In case of an accident, the Employee Compensation Act, 1923 (Karmachari Kshatipurti Niyam 1923) will be applicable. Candidates who do not join within the specified time will have their selection treated as automatically cancelled. MPEZ reserves the right to cancel/limit/extend the selection process without prior notice or providing any reason. All legal and judicial matters related to this advertisement and recruitment will be under the jurisdiction of Jabalpur courts only. Selected candidates will be bound by all existing and future rules and regulations framed by MPEZ Jabalpur for apprentice engagement. All revisions/corrigendum (if any) will be hosted on the company's official website www.mpez.co.in only — candidates should visit regularly.
